book_no.text: เลขที่หนังสือ

book_date.text: วันที่หนังสือ

book_payment_date.text: ชำระภายในวันที่

combo.manager_position_combo: ผู้จัดการ /ผู้ช่วยผู้จัดการ รักษาการในตำแหน่งผู้จัดการ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ) AS mem_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
, ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year + 543 ) AS receive_year , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_month_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month) AS receive_month , to_snumber( NVL( PKA_KEP.fp_get_money_amount_unk(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ),0) - NVL(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.ppm_amount,0) ) AS kep_ppm_amount , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.kep_method_amount
, '!book_no_1!' as book_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as book_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_payment_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as book_payment_date
-- ที่อยู่ สหกรณ์ , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.address AS coop_address , sc_cnt_m_coop.muu AS coop_muu , sc_cnt_m_coop.road AS coop_road , sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name AS coop_tumbol_name , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code , sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code ) AS coop_district_name , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code ) AS coop_province_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode AS coop_postcode
-- ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน สมาชิก -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '6' ) , '-' , '' , 'บ้านเลขที่ ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '6' ) ) AS address_pres_address_no -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '8' ) , '-' , '' , ' หมู่ที่ ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '8' ) ) AS address_pres_moo -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '7' ) , '-' , '' , ' หมู่บ้าน ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '7' ) ) AS address_pres_mooban -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '9' ) , '-' , '' , ' ถนน ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '9' ) ) AS address_pres_road -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '10' ) , '-' , '' , ' ซอย ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '10' ) ) AS address_pres_soi -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '11' ) , '-' , '' , ' ตำบล ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '11' ) ) AS address_pres_tambol -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '12' ) , '-' , '' , 'อำเภอ ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '12' ) ) AS address_pres_district -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '13' ) , '-' , '' , ' จังหวัด ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '13' ) ) AS address_pres_province -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '14' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '14' ) ) AS address_pres_post -- , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '15' ) , '-' , '' , 'เบอร์โทรศัพท์ ' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '15' ) ) AS address_pres_telephone
,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '6' ) AS address_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '8' ) AS moo ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '7' ) as mooban ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '9' )AS road ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '10' ) AS soi ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '11' ) AS tambol ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '12' ) AS district ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '13' ) AS province ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '14' ) AS postcode ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '15' ) as telephone
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_cnt_m_coop
WHERE 1=1 AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' AND NVL( PKA_KEP.fp_get_money_amount_unk(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ),0) > NVL(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.ppm_amount,0) --AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2025 --AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 8 /*WHERE*/
ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no ASC

r_tnma_member_book_return_one_month_nest.sql:
select tab.* FROM ( SELECT sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group , sc_kep_m_ucf_process.proc_detail , sc_kep_m_ucf_process.order_no --, sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code --, sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_name --, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.loan_type AS loan_type , SUM( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount ) AS unkeep_money_amount
, SUM( ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.unkeep_money_amount ) - NVL( ( SELECT SUM( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) AS item_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_receipt_item WHERE sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'PPM' OR sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' ) AND sc_com_m_receipt.month_membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no AND sc_com_m_receipt.month_receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year AND sc_com_m_receipt.month_receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month AND sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.loan_type ),0) ) AS after_unkeep_amount
FROM sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive , sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_kep_m_ucf_process
WHERE 1=1 AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group = sc_kep_m_ucf_process.proc_code AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' AND NVL( PKA_KEP.fp_get_money_amount_unk(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.seq_no ),0) > NVL(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.ppm_amount,0) AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/
GROUP BY sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_group , sc_kep_m_ucf_process.proc_detail , sc_kep_m_ucf_process.order_no --, sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_code , sc_kep_m_ucf_keeping_item_type.keeping_type_name , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.loan_type
ORDER BY sc_kep_m_ucf_process.order_no ASC ) tab
WHERE tab.after_unkeep_amount > 0
